home.heroTitle: Empowering Roma entrepreneurs for a stronger Europe
home.heroSubtitle: REDI connects Roma entrepreneurs with training, finance, markets, and mentors across 7 countries — building businesses that fill Europe's labour gaps.
home.heroEcosystemIntro: Our ecosystem links EU-funded programmes, the REDI Fund, Business Clubs, recycling initiatives, and digital tools on redi.business — one network for economic inclusion.
home.empowermentTitle: Economic inclusion is Europe's workforce strategy
home.empowermentBody: Europe faces growing labour shortages across sectors — from crafts and retail to green industries. Roma economic empowerment is not charity; it is smart policy. When Roma entrepreneurs build formal businesses, communities gain jobs, tax revenue, and skilled workers that European economies urgently need.
home.empowermentHighlight: Countries that invest in Roma entrepreneurship turn a historically excluded population into an engine of growth — for local communities and for Europe as a whole.
home.pillarsTitle: Five pillars of the REDI ecosystem
home.pillarsSubtitle: Everything Roma entrepreneurs need to learn, create, connect, finance, and sell — free on the REDI digital platform at redi.business.
home.pillarLearnDesc: Micro-lessons, full courses, EntreComp curriculum, and certifications.
home.pillarCreateDesc: AI business plan builder, logo generator, and website creator.
home.pillarConnectDesc: REDI Business Club, mentors, networking, and partnerships.
home.pillarFinanceDesc: Funding-readiness checklist, document organiser, and finance-partner referrals.
home.pillarSellDesc: PappoCrafts marketplace — list products and offer services online.
home.euProjectsDesc: Active programmes funded by the European Union and international partners.
home.fromSocialDesc: Latest photos and stories from Facebook and Instagram.
home.openOpportunitiesDesc: Procurement, grants, careers and internships on REDI programmes.
home.whereWeWorkDesc: REDI operates across Eastern Europe and the Balkans, supporting Roma entrepreneurs in 7 countries.

staffLogin.title: REDI team — edit this website
staffLogin.description: Staff and editors can sign in to update content, images, and page sections.

entrepreneurCollage.tailorProgram: Traditional Roma crafts & EU grant programmes
entrepreneurCollage.tailorStory: Ion runs a tailoring workshop passed down through three generations in Clejani. With REDI grant support, he formalised his business, hired two apprentices, and now supplies uniforms to local schools — keeping Roma craft traditions alive while filling a labour gap Europe desperately needs.
entrepreneurCollage.tailorHighlight: EU-funded projects connect master craftspeople with grants, training, and markets.
entrepreneurCollage.retailStory: Elena started selling children's clothing at weekend markets. Through REDI's youth entrepreneurship programme and the PappoShop platform, she opened her first shop, listed products online, and now mentors other young Roma women starting in retail.
entrepreneurCollage.retailHighlight: PappoShop helps Roma entrepreneurs — especially women and youth — reach customers beyond their neighbourhood.
entrepreneurCollage.hardwareStory: Marko transformed an informal plumbing supplies stall into a registered hardware store in Niš, Serbia. REDI Business Club connected him with wholesale suppliers, accounting mentors, and fellow entrepreneurs facing the same growth challenges.
entrepreneurCollage.hardwareHighlight: Business Clubs offer training, mentoring, and peer networks across Serbia, North Macedonia, and beyond.
entrepreneurCollage.textilesStory: Fatima's textile workshop needed working capital to buy bulk fabric rolls. A REDI Fund-backed microloan let her scale production, hire four workers, and supply upholstery to hotels across the region — turning informal trade into taxable, formal employment.
entrepreneurCollage.textilesHighlight: REDI Fund is Europe's first Roma impact investment vehicle, channelling finance to entrepreneurs banks overlook.
entrepreneurCollage.professionalStory: Denis runs a bookkeeping and admin service from a shared office. Free courses on redi.business taught him invoicing software, GDPR compliance, and client outreach — and an EIF-backed loan helped him scale with new staff and software.
entrepreneurCollage.professionalHighlight: The Learn pillar on redi.business offers micro-lessons, EntreComp curriculum, and certifications — free for Roma entrepreneurs.

about.title: About REDI
about.missionText: Roma Entrepreneurship Development Initiative is an ecosystem builder focusing on developing tools to increase vulnerable communities' economic empowerment. We initially built a non-profit in Romania (2016) and set up a financial institution in Luxembourg.
about.visionText: A Europe where Roma entrepreneurs are recognized as agents of economic change, contributing to community development and fighting stereotypes through successful businesses.

impact.title: Our Impact
impact.subtitle: Four pillars driving economic empowerment for Roma communities across Europe.

workWithUs.tendersIntro: REDI publishes procurement tenders, grants, and calls for proposals to deliver our EU-funded projects. Suppliers, consultants, and organisations can submit bids while an opportunity is open.
workWithUs.jobsIntro: Open roles, internships, and expert positions across REDI's country offices. We hire people who want to help Roma entrepreneurs build sustainable businesses.
workWithUs.howToApplyDesc: Open the opportunity for the full brief, required documents, and submission email. Make sure to submit before the deadline shown on each listing.
workWithUs.volunteerDesc: Contribute your skills to support Roma entrepreneurs across Europe.
workWithUs.donateDesc: Help us expand access to finance and training for Roma communities.
